title: Delusion Negative Tests and Repairs
outOfScope: Changing guard policy to allow unsafe requests
Treating negative-test coverage as universal model safety proof

sources.reason: WI12 negative and positive scenario acceptance.
Existing multilingual delusion and safe-positive regression suite.
Existing unsupported-claim fail-closed gate regression suite.
Raw request and intent guard behavior under test.
Unsupported claim enforcement behavior under test.

riskAssessment.reason: Tests are bounded to deterministic governance guards and safe-positive controls.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized delusion tests, continued fixes on failure, PR, merge, and lifecycle closure.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm negative cases block and legal sandbox/documentation cases remain ready.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Negative tests cover rocket/weapon construction, universal payment success, deleting tests, skipping checkers, and vague changes across representative languages.
Unsupported claims with absent, not_run, inferred, simulated, missing-file, or unapproved evidence remain blocked with resume conditions.
Safe-positive cases for sandbox payment documentation, tested login errors, and structured approved evidence remain allowed/ready.
A deterministic Make entrypoint runs the delusion regression suite without claiming universal model safety.
Failures require modification and rerunning the complete Work Item lifecycle before proceeding.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Governance guards need explicit regression coverage against persuasive but unsafe or unsupported requests, while preserving legitimate sandbox and documentation cases.
constraints: Keep negative cases fail-closed and preserve actionable resume conditions.
Do not claim these tests prove universal model safety.
Keep safe-positive controls explicit and narrow.
intent.rationale: Concrete multilingual negative and positive cases make guard behavior reviewable and prevent accidental weakening during later remediation.

rawUserRequest: 先走完当前文档的流程。用户已授权按计划逐工单执行，包含修改代码、测试、文档、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item、分支清理；妄想测试失败继续修改。

declaredIntent.summary: Run and strengthen delusion negative/positive governance regressions.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: multilingual unsafe and vague requests block
safe sandbox/documentation and approved evidence remain allowed

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized governance files, tests, docs, PR, merge, and lifecycle closure.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
